title: Videotape; admissibility; exception to hearsay rule
doc_html:
§440.3.  Videotape; admissibility; exception to hearsay rule

The videotape authorized by this Subpart is hereby admissible in evidence as an exception to the hearsay rule.  

Acts 1984, No. 563, §1.
